extraction_reasoning: The litigation table separates matters by direction and category: against the Company are 0 criminal, 4 tax and 1 statutory/regulatory proceedings; against Subsidiaries are 2 criminal, 43 tax and 6 statutory/regulatory proceedings. I counted only these against rows, excluding the Company’s 1 material civil matter filed by the Company and the Subsidiaries’ 1 criminal and 1 material civil matters filed by them; accordingly, against-group quantified amounts are ₹5.56 million for the Company plus ₹911.48 million for Subsidiaries, totaling ₹917.04 million, or ₹91.704 crore. The contingent-liabilities table is dated March 31, 2023 and has no stated Total row, so the disclosed line items of ₹113.52 million, ₹90.72 million, ₹26.50 million and ₹45.00 million were summed to ₹275.74 million, or ₹27.574 crore. The only customer-related concentration percentage is not disclosed; the percentages shown are hotel/operator, hotel, city and acquired-hotel concentrations, not company-wide top-five or top-ten customer revenue, and the stated revenue denominators are revenue from operations or Total Income for FY2023. Monetary tables use ₹ million, converted to crore by dividing by 10 (1 crore = ₹10 million).
